2605.11143.title: ClinicalBench: Stress-Testing Assertion-Aware Retrieval for Cross-Admission Clinical QA on MIMIC-IV
2605.11143.paper_summary: Reasoning benchmarks measure clinical performance on clean inputs. We evaluate the step before reasoning: retrieval over real EHR notes, where negation, temporality, and family-versus-patient attribution can flip a correct answer to a wrong one. EpiKG carries an assertion label and a temporality tag with every fact in a patient knowledge graph, then routes retrieval by question intent. ClinicalBench is a 400-question test over 43 MIMIC-IV patients across 9 assertion-sensitive categories. A 7-condition ablation tests each piece of EpiKG across six LLMs (Claude Opus 4.6, GPT-OSS 20B, MedGemma 27B, Gemma 4 31B, MedGemma 1.5 4B, Qwen 3.5 35B). Three physicians blindly adjudicated 100 paired items. The author-blind primary endpoint, leave-author-out paired exact McNemar on 50 unanimous-strict items rated by two external physicians, yields +22.0 percentage points (95 percent Newcombe CI [+5.1, +31.5], p=0.0192). The architectural novelty, intent-aware KG-RAG over a Contriever dense-RAG baseline (C2b to C4g_kw on the change-excluded n=362 endpoint), is +8.84 percentage points (paired McNemar p=1.79e-3); +12.43 percentage points under oracle intent. Sensitivities agree directionally: three-rater physician majority +24.0 percentage points (subject to single-author circularity); deterministic keyword reproducibility proxy +39.5 percentage points. Across the six models, the gain shrinks as the LLM-alone baseline rises (beta=-1.123, r=-0.921, p=0.009). With n=6 this looks more like regression to the mean than encoding substituting for model size. Physician adjudication identified 56 percent of auto-generated reference answers as defective, a methodological finding indicating that NLP-pipeline clinical-QA benchmarks require physician adjudication to be usable. ClinicalBench, the frozen evaluator, three-rater adjudication data, and the EpiKG output stack are publicly released.
2605.11143.paper_summary_zh: 推理基準測量在乾淨輸入上的臨床表現。我們評估推理之前的步驟：在真實的電子健康紀錄（EHR）筆記上進行檢索，其中否定、時間性和家庭與患者的歸屬可以將正確答案轉變為錯誤答案。EpiKG 在患者知識圖中為每個事實附帶一個斷言標籤和一個時間性標籤，然後根據問題意圖進行檢索。ClinicalBench 是一個包含 400 道問題的測試，涵蓋 43 名 MIMIC-IV 患者，分為 9 個對斷言敏感的類別。一個 7 條件的消融測試了 EpiKG 的每個部分，涵蓋六種 LLM（Claude Opus 4.6、GPT-OSS 20B、MedGemma 27B、Gemma 4 31B、MedGemma 1.5 4B、Qwen 3.5 35B）。三名醫生盲目評判了 100 對配對項目。作者盲目的主要終點，在 50 個由兩名外部醫生評定的一致嚴格項目上進行的留作者外配對精確 McNemar，得出 +22.0 個百分點（95% Newcombe CI [+5.1, +31.5]，p=0.0192）。架構新穎性，意圖感知的 KG-RAG 相較於 Contriever 密集 RAG 基線（C2b 到 C4g_kw 在變更排除的 n=362 終點上），為 +8.84 個百分點（配對 McNemar p=1.79e-3）；在預言者意圖下為 +12.43 個百分點。靈敏度在方向上達成一致：三評醫生的多數 +24.0 個百分點（受單一作者循環影響）；確定性關鍵字可重複性代理 +39.5 個百分點。在六個模型中，隨著 LLM 單獨基線的上升，增益縮小（beta=-1.123，r=-0.921，p=0.009）。在 n=6 的情況下，這更像是回歸均值，而不是編碼取代模型大小。醫生評判識別出 56% 的自動生成參考答案為缺陷，這一方法學發現表明 NLP 流程臨床 QA 基準需要醫生評判才能可用。ClinicalBench、冷凍評估者、三評醫生評判數據和 EpiKG 輸出堆棧已公開發布。
2605.11143.author: Alex Stinard et.al.
